name: io.github.douglasgan/asktian
description: Chinese metaphysics (bazi, qimen, 5-element, daily 干支) as decision-support tools for AI agents. Ask 'when should I do X' and get specific time windows instead of vague advice.

environmentVariables.name: ASKTIAN_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OPTIONAL. Leave blank to test in local-fallback mode (works instantly). For real, full-accuracy readings, get a free key at https://api.asktian.com and paste it here.
